description: Letter from Ibrāhīm b. Abī l-Ḥayy Khalīla to Abū Saʿd Nissim b. Nahray. Ca. 1100. Written after the death of Nahray, hence the estimated dating, concerning the withdrawal of funds from an unspecified business. “Avon” is mentioned; this is probably Avon b. Ṣadaqa, who lived for many years in Jerusalem and, according to this author, has recently arrived in Alexandria. This is the upper fragment.
description_he: מכתב מאיברהים בן אבי אל-חי לאבו סעד נסים בן נהריי, בערך 1100. על משיכת כספים מעסק לאחר מות נהריי.
